title: Will Trump make 2 trips to Mar-a-Lago as President in Jun 2026?

current.lean_note: 53pt gap exceeds the hard ceiling (20pt) — beyond this divergence from a liquid market, even high confidence is treated as model error, not edge
current.rationale_summary: Based on the evidence, Trump has visited Mar-a-Lago multiple times in 2026, including at least 24 times as of March 2026, suggesting a strong pattern of frequent visits. However, the exact number of trips in June 2026 is not specified, and there is limited information on his schedule for that specific period. While the evidence supports that he is active in Florida and has plans for events such as
key_drivers: Trump's frequent visits to Mar-a-Lago as of March 2026
crypto conference) that may influence his schedule
Uncertainty in the specific number of trips in June 2026
reference_classes: Frequent presidential visits to Mar-a-Lago in 2026
Presidential travel patterns during active campaign or event periods
research_refs: Citizens for Responsibility and Ethics in Washington

history.lean_note: I lean NO (my prob 2%) but it isn't +EV at the ask — no value bet (betting the other side would contradict my forecast).
history.rationale_summary: Two June Mar-a-Lago trips is very unlikely given seasonal closure and a packed Iran/G7/NATO schedule.

history.lean_note: I lean NO (my prob 3%) but it isn't +EV at the ask — no value bet (betting the other side would contradict my forecast).
history.rationale_summary: Two June Mar-a-Lago trips highly unlikely given summer Bedminster pattern + Iran war in DC; corrected down from incoherent local estimate.

history.lean_note: no +EV value bet at the ask (my prob 1%, modal NO) — staying out.
history.rationale_summary: Seasonal closure of Mar-a-Lago during summer makes any visits impossible, directly contradicting the 'exactly 2 trips' claim. Base rate of two off-season trips in seven days is near-impossible, reinforcing zero probability.
key_drivers: Impracticality of two trips in seven days
reference_classes: Two off-season FL trips in 7 days near-impossible
